epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5 criteria: Persistent depressed mood, loss of interest, at least 5 symptoms for 2 weeks

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Psychotherapy and SSRIs via SUS; CAPS centers
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Regional disparities in access; North/Northeast shortages
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Free treatment in SUS; ABP guidelines integration
